blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 48".
